label: Apr 26 – Jun 4, 2026
period_mismatch_note: This report covers 40 days vs the prior report's 30 days. Raw-count deltas are inflated by the longer window; rate metrics (CPL, CTR, conv rate) remain comparable.

summary.narrative: A mixed, longer 40-day period. Combined spend of $20.6K produced 77 leads at $267 each — more volume than last period, but unit economics slipped 16%. Google Ads remains the workhorse: 39 conversions (+30%) and the paused Feeder Markets campaign was successfully replaced with a low-cost Display awareness play. The concern is Meta: the Sarasota prospecting campaign's cost per lead nearly tripled to $473, dragging Meta's blended CPL to $228. Organic search demand keeps climbing (queries +48%), though average position slipped. The pipeline cooled — no new Hot leads or reservations this period — but sales visits held at 15 and several high-value prospects ($4M–$6M range) are in active dialogue.

google_ads.ctr_note: Search-only CTR (comparable to prior periods). Blended CTR incl. the new Display campaign is 0.8% on 366K impressions.
google_ads.top_ad: Mira Mar Residences | Sarasota Luxury Condos | Historic Sarasota Icon Reborn

meta_ads.top_creative: Image_Where Legacy Takes Residence (Feeder campaign) — 10 leads at $149 CPL; static image now outperforming video for lead gen

vs_2026-04-25.period_note: Current period is 40 days; prior was 30 days. Count deltas inflated ~33% by window length; rates are comparable.

recommendations.headline: Rein in Meta Sarasota prospecting
recommendations.detail: CPL nearly tripled to $473 (9 leads on $4,254). Shift budget toward Feeder Markets ($187 CPL, 20 leads — now the best prospecting campaign) and Remarketing ($75 CPL).

recommendations.headline: Fix phone coverage
recommendations.detail: 8 of 21 calls missed (38%) and answer rate fell from 87% to 76%. Half of all calls came from the Print Ad number — make sure that line rings through to sales during business hours.

recommendations.headline: Decide what Display is for
recommendations.detail: New Display Placements campaign spent $1,560 for 332K impressions but 1 conversion. Fine as an awareness play; bad as lead gen. Set the expectation explicitly or cap the budget.

recommendations.headline: Scale the winning image creative
recommendations.detail: "Where Legacy Takes Residence" static image drove 12 leads across two ads at ~$149–$359 CPL, beating every video on lead gen. Produce 2-3 variants of this concept.

recommendations.headline: Sharpen Sarasota SEO targeting
recommendations.detail: Queries +48% but average position slipped to 9.5, and much of the new volume is mismatched "Miramar, FL apartments" searches with 0 clicks. Lean into Sarasota-specific content to recover position 7-8.

recommendations.headline: Re-engage the warm bench for Hot conversions
recommendations.detail: No new Hot leads or reservations this period, but the warm list is high quality: multiple $4M–$6M prospects (Ed B., Walter Cleary, Deborah Kobylt, Gregory Kerchner) in active dialogue. A groundbreaking-milestone event or incentive could convert 1-2 to reservations.
